name: Uzbek Palov
recipeIngredient: 2 each Onions cut to strips 1/4-inch-wide and 2 inches long
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large, heavy skillet over High heat.
2. Drop the lamb cubes into the hot oil and fry for 6-7 minutes, turning them constantly until browned.
3. Remove the lamb with tongs and set aside in a large casserole (4 qt) dish.
4. In the same pan, add onions, garlic, carrots, raisins, chick peas, salt, and pepper. Cook for 3 minutes until the vegetables are lightly browned.
5. Add the cooked rice to the skillet and stir for an additional 3 minutes.
6. Pour in cold water to cover the mixture by about 1 inch. Stir gently.
7. Reduce heat to Low and cover the pan.
8. Simmer for 25 minutes, then remove from heat.
9. Let sit uncovered for 10 minutes before serving.
This recipe is inspired by Chef Yuri Nurbandisha's preparation at Karavan Restraunt in Medeo, Kazakhstan.
